title: nepeta schmidii
intro: Nepeta schmidii, also known as Catmint or Nepeta, is a perennial herb native to the mountains of Eastern Europe and the Mediterranean region. It is a member of the mint family and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Nepeta schmidii include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menstrual cramps and digestive issues. Nepeta schmidii can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed for its medicinal benefits.
